title: Help with IF MOD formula
excerpt:
I need a field that will tell me if a field (Y2D) is divisible by 3 and not = to 0.  I thought I had the formula correct below, but I am getting an error. 
if((AND (MOD({Y2D},3)=0),(({Y2D})>“.5”)),”Y”,”N”)

posts.author: askstratman (Angela Stratman)
posts.cookedHtml:
I need a field that will tell me if a field (Y2D) is divisible by 3 and not = to 0. I thought I had the formula correct below, but I am getting an error.

posts.author: GCavin (Gilles Cavin - Reinventing Formulas in monday.com)
